options.label: fig2-coral
options.fig.cap: Figure 2a. Coral cover (%) by reef site. Boxes show interquartile range; horizontal line = median; diamond = mean. Individual transect points are jittered and coloured by survey year. Letters above boxes indicate groups that differ significantly (Dunn post-hoc, BH-adjusted, p < 0.05).

options.label: fig2-algae
options.fig.cap: Figure 2b. Macroalgae cover (%) by reef site. Symbols as in Figure 2a.

options.label: fig3-stacked
options.fig.cap: Figure 3. Mean benthic substrate composition per site. All bars sum to 100% across five broad categories. Values are averaged across transects per site.

options.label: fig4-dispersion
options.fig.cap: Figure 4. Mean (± SE) benthic category cover per site. Points show individual transect values. Panels separate categories for clarity.

options.label: fig5-morphotype-map
options.fig.cap: Figure 5. Coral growth-form composition at each reef site. Pie chart area is proportional to mean coral cover; slices show proportion of each morphotype (viridis palette). Map created in R using ggplot2 (v≥3.4), sf, rnaturalearth, scatterpie, and ggspatial; all layers are original outputs. Source code available at: https://github.com/rosieyoung2/reef-baseline-bocas.

options.label: fig-heatmap
options.fig.cap: Supplementary: Heatmap of mean percent benthic cover by site and category (viridis palette).

options.label: fish-heatmaps
options.fig.cap: Figure 7 (revised). Fish group abundance by site (log₁₊ₓ transformed). Y-axis label: site; x-axis: functional group.

options.label: fish-bar
options.fig.cap: Total fish group abundance across all sites and survey years.

options.label: fig-health-proportions
options.fig.cap: Coral health status proportions by site. Columns sum to 100% of recorded condition observations.
